rationale: Russian strikes killing nine and destroying a historic Kyiv cathedral continue the established active combat pattern — no qualitative escalation beyond the existing baseline for Ukrainian residents.

top_events.title: Russian strikes kill nine and set historic cathedral in Kyiv ablaze
top_events.summary: Deadly Russian strikes on Kyiv, including destruction of a historic cathedral, continue the established pattern of active warfare. No qualitative escalation beyond prior baseline — ongoing existential threat for Ukrainian residents.

top_events.title: US and Iran announce 'understanding' to end the war / What still needs to be negotiated
top_events.summary: The US-Iran deal continues to develop but remains partially unresolved; its indirect effect on US attention and resources available for Ukraine support is a background concern for Ukrainians.

top_events.title: G7 meeting in France: What's on agenda, who is attending?
top_events.summary: G7 discussions likely include Ukraine support — no confirmed outcomes yet, but the meeting is directly relevant to Ukraine's continued Western backing and war effort.
